description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define a single stage named deploy and add a deploy job that runs only on the master branch, sets the environment name to heroku with URL https://trump-or-orange-api.herokuapp.com/, and executes the exact shell commands: npm install, npm run build, apt-get update -qy, apt-get install ruby -y -q, apt-get install ruby-dev -y -q, gem install dpl, and dpl --provider=heroku --app=trump-or-orange-api --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY --skip-cleanup. Mark the job as a deploy type.
